actions.exportBackupTitle: Export complete task data and update backup status
actions.importTitle: Import and replace current task data

search.syntaxTitle: Supports project:work, tag:study, status:completed, due:today, and #tag
search.syntaxHint: Supports scoped search: project:name, tag:name, status:value, and due:value.

quickAdd.label: Quick add task
quickAdd.hint: Enter a natural date, time, #tag, and /project. Without /project, the task goes to Inbox.
quickAdd.captureReady: Quick capture is ready. Review the text, then press Enter to add it.

tools.label: Quick add and filter tools
tools.collapse: Collapse quick add and filter tools
tools.expand: Expand quick add and filter tools
tools.pin: Pin quick add and filter tools
tools.unpin: Unpin quick add and filter tools

savedViews.label: Smart Views
savedViews.saveCurrentTitle: Save the current search, filters, and view

focus.title: Today Plan
focus.emptyDescription: Add tasks to today plan from task cards or batch actions.

batch.nothingToComplete: The selected tasks have nothing to complete
batch.error: Batch action failed. Please try again

undo.menuTitle: Undo the most recent task action

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.hint: Use the arrow keys to choose a command, then press Enter.

install.menuTitle: Install the app or view install steps
install.title: Install Task Tracer
install.manualIntro: If the browser does not show an install window automatically, use the matching browser path:
install.desktop: Chrome or Edge on desktop: use the install icon in the address bar, or choose Install app from the browser menu.
install.android: Chrome on Android: open the browser menu, then choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
install.ios: Safari on iPhone or iPad: tap Share, then choose Add to Home Screen.

update.label: App update
update.message: A new version is ready. Refresh to use the latest app.

reminderRepeat.label: Repeat Reminder
reminderRepeat.backgroundLimit: The browser checks reminders while the app is open or wakes up; system-level background delivery is not guaranteed.

repeat.label: Repeating Task
repeat.hint: Creates the next occurrence after completion.

actions.reorder: Move task: {taskName}. Use the up and down arrow keys to reorder

repeat.monthly-last: Repeats on the last day of each month

noTasks.title: No Tasks
noTasks.description: Click "Add Task" to start tracking your tasks

noMatches.title: No matching tasks found
noMatches.description: Try adjusting your search or filters

unavailable.title: Local storage is unavailable
unavailable.message: This browser is blocking the local database, so tasks cannot be read or saved. Adjust privacy settings and retry; after storage is available again, restore data from an existing export or backup file.
unavailable.emptyDescription: Task Tracer is in protected mode. All task-writing actions are paused to avoid changes that cannot be saved.
unavailable.snapshotDescription: Task Tracer is in protected mode and task writes are paused. This page still holds an in-memory snapshot of {count} task(s), so download an emergency backup first.
unavailable.short: Local storage is unavailable; task actions are paused
unavailable.actionsDisabled: Local storage is unavailable, so task actions are paused
unavailable.noSnapshot: No task snapshot is available to download

task.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
task.repeatCreated: Task completed and next occurrence created
task.repeatSkipped: This occurrence was skipped and moved to the next one
task.saveError: Failed to save task, please try again
task.deleteError: Failed to delete task, please try again
task.updateError: Failed to update task status, please try again

backup.reminder: Download a recent backup to avoid losing tasks if browser data is cleared.

import.confirm: About to import {count} tasks. Replace current data?
import.previewReplaceValue: {current} current tasks will be replaced, including {completed} completed and {archived} archived
import.restoreSourceLegacy: Legacy task array or unversioned JSON; tasks will be normalized before import.
import.restoreSchemaWarn: File version is {version}; current template is {current}. Task Tracer will try a compatible import.
import.restoreSchemaCompatible: Task Tracer will read the {from} file with compatibility rules and import it into the current template {to}.
import.restoreIntegrityOk: Integrity check passed; the file content matches its checksum.
import.restoreIntegrityMissing: The file has no checksum; Task Tracer can still import compatible task content.
import.restoreIntegrityInvalid: Integrity check failed; the file may be truncated or manually changed. Import with care.
import.restoreIntegrityLegacy: Legacy task arrays do not include an integrity check; tasks will be normalized before import.
import.restoreTasksEmpty: The file has no importable tasks; replace mode will clear the current list.
import.restoreIdsOk: No repeated task IDs were found.
import.restoreIdsWarn: {count} repeated task ID(s) found; import will regenerate IDs and clear ambiguous links.
import.restoreNamesOk: No imported tasks match current task names.
import.restoreNamesWarn: {count} imported task(s) match current names; merge mode can handle them one by one.
import.restoreImpactOk: There are no local tasks, so replace mode will not overwrite existing data.
import.restoreImpactWarn: Replace mode will overwrite {count} current task(s); choose merge mode to keep them.
import.restoreSnapshotAuto: Before replacing, Task Tracer will download a restore snapshot with {count} current task(s) and require another confirmation.
import.restoreSnapshotEmpty: There are no local tasks, so no extra restore snapshot is needed.
import.importSafetyReplace: The first confirmation downloads a pre-import snapshot with {count} current task(s); the next confirmation replaces data.
import.importSafetySnapshotReady: The pre-import snapshot download was triggered. Confirm the file is saved, then confirm again to replace data.
import.importSafetyChecksumRisk: Integrity check failed. Switch to merge mode, or confirm the risk again before replacing data.
import.importSafetyChecksumSnapshot: Integrity risk confirmed. The next confirmation downloads a pre-import snapshot with {count} current task(s); replacement still requires the final confirmation.
import.importSafetyChecksumConfirmed: Integrity risk confirmed. Confirm again to replace current data.
import.importSafetyClean: There are no local tasks, so replace mode will not overwrite existing data.
import.snapshotDownloaded: Pre-import snapshot download was triggered. Confirm the file is saved, then confirm replacement again.
import.integrityReplaceConfirm: Integrity check failed. Switch to merge mode, or confirm the risk again to continue replacing.
import.mergeMode: Merge into current tasks without replacing existing data
import.mergeModeHint: Imported tasks are appended to the current list; duplicate names are kept and imported tasks receive new sort positions.
import.conflictHint: These choices are used only when merge import is selected.

clearCompleted.none: There are no completed tasks to clear
clearCompleted.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {count} completed tasks?

archive.none: There are no completed tasks to archive

view.summary: {view} updated, {count} task(s) in the current scope

messages.initDBError: Failed to init Database, Please refresh the page and try again.

task1.name: Complete project report
task1.description: Write and submit quarterly project summary report

task2.name: Team meeting preparation
task2.description: Prepare presentation materials for next week's team meeting

task3.name: Learning plan development
task3.description: Develop personal learning plan for next month

notifications.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Please enable in browser settings.
notifications.notSupported: This browser does not support desktop notifications
notifications.backgroundLimit: Notifications are enabled. The browser checks reminders while the app is open or wakes up, so background delivery is not fully guaranteed.

health.empty: No task data to back up
health.never: No backup yet. Export/back up now

versionNotes.schema: Backup 2.4 includes an integrity checksum, export ID, local due dates, exact reminder instants, tasks, subtasks, projects, tags, advanced repeat rules, completion dates, archive state, and today plan.
versionNotes.compatibility: The importer reads the tasks array; older export files remain importable through compatibility rules.
versionNotes.emergency: This file was created from an in-memory snapshot in protected storage-unavailable mode. Restore browser storage and import it as soon as practical.
